title: Design Team Announcement!
excerpt: Something strange happened with Wordpress and my post published as a draft - sorry about that! Here is the actual post: It is my absolute pleasure to finally be able to announce this... These seriously talented ladies will be bringing…
body:
Something strange happened with Wordpress and my post published as a draft - sorry about that! Here is the actual post: It is my absolute pleasure to finally be able to announce this...

These seriously talented ladies will be bringing you heaps of inspiration on the blog. I am SO excited about having each of them as part of this team. Their work is so inspiring to me and I know that it will continue to do the same for all of you!
